name: # REQUIRED — Unique property name
property_type: # optional — Type of property. Valid values: RESIDENTIAL_LAND|FARM_LAND|COMMERCIAL|MIXED_USE
description: # optional — Free-text description of the property
estate_land_title: # optional — Title deed / C of O reference number
status: # optional — Publication status. Valid values: DRAFT|PUBLISHED
city: # REQUIRED — City where the property is located
state: # REQUIRED — State where the property is located
address: # optional — Street address (auto-generated from city+state if blank)
nearest_landmark: # optional — Notable landmark near the property
latitude: # optional — GPS latitude in decimal degrees (e.g. 6.524379)
longitude: # optional — GPS longitude in decimal degrees (e.g. 3.379206)
